---
title: "Quantitative Methods in Tourism"
subtitle: "Master in Tourism and Sustainable Development · TIDES · ULPGC"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
---

Slides, code and exercises for the core course **Quantitative Methods in
Tourism** (6 ECTS) of the [Master in Tourism and Sustainable
Development](https://tides.ulpgc.es/) at the
[TIDES Institute](https://tides.ulpgc.es/), Universidad de Las Palmas de
Gran Canaria.

## Instructors

| | |
|---|---|
| Topics 1 & 2 · Introduction to R, Visual exploratory analysis | **Christian González** |
| Topics 3 & 4 · Machine learning, NLP | **Juan Hernández Guerra** |

Both at the Department of Quantitative Methods in Economics and
Management, ULPGC.

## Topic 1 · Introduction to R

- [Git & GitHub essentials](01-introduction-to-r/01-git-github.qmd)
- [Data in R](01-introduction-to-r/02-data-in-r.qmd)
- [Data wrangling](01-introduction-to-r/03-data-wrangling.qmd)
- [Basic statistics with R](01-introduction-to-r/04-basic-statistics.qmd)

## Topic 2 · Visual exploratory analysis

- [One-variable visualisation](02-visual-exploratory-analysis/01-one-variable.qmd)
- [Multi-variable visualisation](02-visual-exploratory-analysis/02-multiple-variables.qmd)
- [Editing reproducible documents](02-visual-exploratory-analysis/03-editing-documents.qmd)

## Resources

- [Exercises](exercises/index.qmd) — per-day templates, submitted via fork.
- [Datasets](datasets/index.qmd) — ISTAC and Eurostat tourism data.

## License

Content released under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/).
Source code on [GitHub](https://github.com/chrglez/quantitative-methods-master-tides).
